FROM THE EDITOR · JAN–JUN 2026
Hey folks! 👋 Edition #1 is finally here and we're so glad you're reading this. This newsletter is something we've been wanting to do for a while, and it captures what we want to highlight and that's YOU! Yep, all of it: the stories, the wins, the updates you didn't know you needed. We want to bridge the gap of our team working in silos and highlight how there's so much to learn from each other and grow as a team! So get right into it and see if you can spot a little bit of what you do everyday somewhere here in the newsletter! And if not, let us know we will figure this out together (we have a bedazzled feedback button waiting for your response!)

PS: Don't miss the photos at the end. 📸
The EXPA Team
Digital Engagement
Vishal Srivastava
Build and manage digital platforms and websites that connect patients and HCPs with the information they need, driving seamless online experiences.
Omnichannel
Sharath Narayan
Create consistent and connected brand experiences across all channels, online, offline, and everything in between, ensuring a unified journey for every user.
Personalization
Brajendra Singh Yadav
Delivering tailored digital experiences by ensuring the right content reaches the right user at the right time, making every interaction relevant and meaningful.
Tagging
Delivering tailored digital experiences by ensuring the right content reaches the right user at the right time, making every interaction relevant and meaningful.
SECTION 02 · TEAM HIGHLIGHTS THIS MONTH'S WINS
TEAM HIGHLIGHTS

Wins worth celebrating.

Wins from across Digital Engagement, Omnichannel, and Medical Omnichannel, AI tools, pipeline speed-ups, and awards. Filter by team or browse all.

AI-Powered Digital Analytics Platform
Digital Engagement
Nidhi Dalvi · Intern · Digital Engagement
Built an AI-powered analytics tool on Claude, unifying KPI setting, site performance, and business case evaluation in one interface.
Project: AI-Powered Digital Analytics Platform
Built on Claude, the tool consolidates KPI Target Setting, Website Performance Analysis, Business Case Justification, and an AI Conversational Assistant into a single interface. It derives KPI targets through a five-step population funnel, delivers source-cited performance insights, and evaluates business cases against the Lilly Prioritisation Framework, creating a standardised, replicable framework across brands, markets, and indications.
Search Capability Team
Digital Engagement
Abhishek · Darpan · Prabhanjan · Priyanka · Ranima · Digital Engagement
Follow the Sun model cut Foundayo issue resolution from 14–18 hrs to just 2–4 hrs, driving 244K visits in launch week. Search Buddy recognised at DE3 Townhall. Ranima won the Q1 2026 Impact Award for GEO.
Project: Foundayo Launch, Follow the Sun SEO/SEM + Search Buddy + GEO
The team united U.S. and Bengaluru into a seamless 24-hour operation, eliminating overnight monitoring gaps and cutting issue resolution time from 14–18 hours to just 2–4 hours. Search drove more than 244K visits to Foundayo's digital front door in the first week. Search Buddy, the team's AI agent, was recognised at the DE3 Digital Engagement Townhall for improving productivity in research and data-heavy workflows by 10–30%. Ranima Peethambaran received the Q1 2026 Impact Award for GEO efforts on Mounjaro, Omvoh, and other brands, directly improving customer access through LLMs.
Cross-Team Collaboration
Omnichannel
Initiative · Omnichannel
10–15% story-points cut per year: one PoC now covers the entire request instead of separate OC and DT PoCs.
Initiative: Cross-Team Collaboration
A single PoC now covers the entire request instead of separate OC and DT PoCs, cutting an estimated 10–15% of story-points per year.
IBU Chat Buddy
Omnichannel
AI Agent · Omnichannel
Around 20% effort reduction for users: a Copilot-powered agent tuned for the team, with quicker turnaround on affiliate queries.
Project: IBU Chat Buddy
A Copilot-powered agent tuned for the team, giving quicker turnaround on affiliate queries and roughly a 20% effort reduction for users.
Adobe Transition Readiness & Medical Orchestration
Medical Omnichannel
GMCxO · Medical Omnichannel
Medical base go-live on Jun 16, Workfront onboarding underway, SR Suggestions scaling to Mexico and Brazil via Zaidyn.
Programme: Adobe Transition Readiness
 Cognitive health single-send journey goes live June 16 with a fast-lane handoff process for migration brands. Workfront onboarding and RACI for the Adobe CSC model are in progress. ServiceNow catalog provides a single structured intake for Global Medical Orchestration. SR Suggestions are scaling to Mexico and Brazil via IBU Zaidyn engines, and the team is working end-to-end on SFMC-to-AJO base sends.
AI in Action: Claude Code Wins
Medical Omnichannel
Vansh Arora · Sanjib · GMCxO
Day-long debugging cut to a 15-min RCA with Claude Code; Sanjib's log-analyzer agent reads 100K+ line YARN logs and returns structured reports.
Project: Claude Code in the Pipeline
 Vansh Arora integrated Claude Code with the data pipeline, turning day-long manual debugging into roughly 15-minute automated root-cause analysis, showcasing at the GMS Virtual AI Showcase. Sanjib built a reusable log-analyzer agent that reads 100K+ line YARN logs and returns structured RCA reports, so any team member can go from failed job to root cause in minutes with no manual log trawling.
Foundayo Launch Tracking
Tagging
Chahina · Samrat · Muskaan · Sahil · Team · Tagging
Full-stack tracking coverage across all Foundayo touchpoints, enabling actionable insights on user behavior and campaign performance from day one of launch.
Project: Foundayo · Consumer & HCP Pages · IST & EST hours
Full-stack tracking coverage across all Foundayo touchpoints, enabling actionable insights on user behavior, high-value actions, and campaign performance from day one of launch. webSDK implementation by Chahina and Samrat; GA4 and high-value action events by Muskaan and Sahil; 3rd party pixel integration by the entire team. Key outcomes: seamless tracking, robust analytics, and campaign performance visibility from launch.
UAE UE: First-Ever IBU webSDK
Tagging
Chahina · Sumit · Kavin · Tagging
Pioneered IBU's first-ever webSDK setup, unlocking enterprise-grade analytics for the UAE UE market, delivered end-to-end and on schedule.
Project: UAE UE · IBU Market · First-of-its-kind implementation
Pioneered IBU's first-ever webSDK setup, unlocking enterprise-grade analytics for the UAE UE market. webSDK by Chahina and Sumit; GA4, HVA mapping, and SPLUNK integration by Chahina, Sumit, and Kavin. Outcomes: IBU's first webSDK delivering enterprise analytics, accurate high-value action measurement, and multi-platform tracking with SPLUNK integration.
SECTION 03 · TEAM SPOTLIGHT PERSONALIZATION
★ Born January 2026

The Personalization Team.

We're the team that designs, builds, and ships personalized experiences across Lilly's brand portfolio, Foundayo, Zepbound, Mounjaro, Ebglyss, to name a few, for both HCPs and consumers. Working across AJO, AEP, and Adobe Target, we turn behavioral signals and audience data into campaigns and site experiences that arrive at the right moment, with the right message. Every email cadence, every dynamic site section, every next-best-content decision is orchestrated, tested, and built to feel relevant. If you've ever thought "huh, that felt weirdly relevant," there's a decent chance one of us was behind it.

Built on AJO · AEP · Adobe Target
Crew 21 humans & counting
★ Brands we power
Foundayo Zepbound Mounjaro Ebglyss Taltz Omvoh Amyvid
★ Live & Shipping ★ In Market

Foundayo™ HCP journey is live.

Foundayo launched April 1, 2026 as the first GLP-1 pill approved for weight loss, Lilly's biggest new product moment of the year. We architected a multi-touch HCP nurture in AJO that adapted to each recipient's behavior, anchored by two strategic message tracks.

01
"RSVP today to learn about the new oral treatment option" National Broadcast invite 235K initial + 197K smart resend
02
"See the data for Foundayo™" Clinical results spotlight 233K initial + 197K smart resend
235K HCPs Reached
9.8K Clicks
26% Open Rate
Top conversion: 928 HCPs clicked through to register for the live broadcast, over half of all unique clicks in the journey.
Also Live A/B test on foundayo.lilly.com: our new RelayHub agent vs the LLM chatbot. May the best bot win.

Full-stack tracking coverage across all Foundayo touchpoints, enabling actionable insights on user behavior and campaign performance from day one of launch.

★ Fresh Win · Just Shipped ★ Partnership Campaign

Oura × Lilly Direct is live.

Lilly Direct partnered with Oura on a multi-stage, consent-driven campaign, driving awareness and letting new and existing users redeem exclusive Oura Ring offers. Our team architected a four-email journey across two platforms (AJO + SFMC), triggered in real time, with a unique redemption URL for every recipient and zero duplicates.

450K+ Targeted
4 Email Journey
90-Day Enrolment
Why it matters A scalable, repeatable blueprint for future brand partnerships.
★ Also In Motion
★ In Flight

15 POCs cooking.

Quiet hours, frequency capping, SMS short URLs, voucher codes, web personalization, journey splits, time zones, and more, each one sharpens what we ship next.

★ Always Shipping

35+ base emails. 6 brands.

Taltz, Ebglyss, Omvoh, Amyvid, Mounjaro, Zepbound, and counting.

SECTION 04 · LEADERSHIP NOTE NOTE FROM
SK
◆ NOTE FROM LEADERSHIP
Seema Kashyap
Senior Lead

Introducing EXPA: Experience Activation

At Lilly, we aim to deliver world-class experiences. And experience is never a single touchpoint; it's everything our consumers touch and feel. It's the website someone lands on, the personalized message that meets them, the search that helps them find what matters, and the next best action that moves them forward.

Bringing that to life consistently, at global scale, takes a capability built for exactly that purpose. That's why I'm proud to introduce EXPA. As part of our global commercial capabilities, and based out of Lilly Bangalore, EXPA (Digital Enablement & Experience Practice) supports commercial and medical functions across all our US and OUS markets.

We help build websites, collate the Unified Experience surfaces, make them easy to find, design and activate personalized journeys, and recommend the next best action that carries each interaction forward, working cohesively under one roof. That is our mandate: to be the single, trusted practice where digital experience is orchestrated and continuously improved, making the complex feel effortless and the global feel local.

I'm excited for what we'll build together. Stay tuned to this newsletter to keep yourself updated!

SPECIAL · THE LILLY AI DIGEST JUNE 2026 · LAUNCH ISSUE
The Lilly AI Digest.
The stories that mattered in AI lately, curated for everyone.
ISSUE · 02
JUNE 2026
~9 MIN READ
Welcome, humans. Here's the latest that mattered in AI, the Claude stories, the big enterprise moves, a pharma signal, and one Lilly-grown next step. Let's go.
12 STORIES · LIVE This week in AI, tap to read Fable 5 + Sonnet 5 · Claude Science · GPT-5.6 · Claude #1 · Rep model shift · Opus 4.8 · +6
01
⚡ Two new Claudes dropped this week (and one already survived a shutdown)
Anthropic restored access to Claude Fable 5 on July 1 after a brief suspension tied to U.S. export controls, and shipped Claude Sonnet 5 alongside it. Fable 5 is the safety-hardened sibling of Mythos 5; Sonnet 5 is the new everyday workhorse. Read more
02
🧬 There is now a version of Claude built to do science, and pharma is the test
Anthropic launched Claude Science, a flagship product aimed at research workflows like literature synthesis, hypothesis generation, and data analysis, with early positioning leaning heavily on drug discovery and life sciences. Read more
03
🤝 Every big pharma just quietly picked its AI partner. Here is the map.
AI partnerships across the top pharmas jumped roughly 120% year over year. OpenAI is working with Novo Nordisk, Moderna, and Sanofi; Anthropic’s enterprise deals include a 30,000-seat rollout at Bristol Myers Squibb. Read more
04
🌐 OpenAI’s smartest model exists. You are just not allowed to use it yet.
OpenAI previewed the GPT-5.6 family (Sol, Terra, Luna) but limited access to a small set of government-approved partners at the U.S. government’s request. Sol is its most capable model to date. Read more
05
🏆 The chart nobody predicted: Claude passed OpenAI inside the enterprise
A year ago OpenAI owned the enterprise: 32% of U.S. business AI adoption vs Anthropic’s 8%. Per Ramp’s May 2026 AI Index (actual corporate card spend), Anthropic now sits at 34.4%, OpenAI at 32.3%, the first time in the lead. Read more
U.S. BUSINESS AI ADOPTION · % OF CORPORATE AI SPEND
May 2025
OpenAI
Anthropic
May 2026
OpenAI
Anthropic ★
SOURCE · RAMP AI INDEX
Why it matters for us: we’re already on the platform that just became the enterprise leader. Not nothing.
06
🤝 One firm just handed AI to 276,000 people at once
KPMG rolled Claude out to 276,000 employees through its Digital Gateway platform, one of the largest enterprise deployments to date. Read more
07
💰 Anthropic is now the most valuable private AI company on earth, by a wide margin
Anthropic closed a new raise that reportedly values it around $965B, making it the most valuable private AI company. Read more
08
🩺 The rep is not dying. The rep-as-messenger is.
Agentic next-best-action systems now coordinate multi-channel HCP outreach in real time, and the validated commercial numbers are hard to ignore.
Across validated client cohorts, these systems show a 19% script lift, with top programs reaching a 30% uplift, deployable in 8 to 12 weeks. The catch is simple: it only works on clean, connected data. Read more
AGENTIC NBA · VALIDATED COMMERCIAL UPLIFT
Script lift (validated cohorts)
+19%
Top program uplift
+30%
Why it matters for us: this is exactly what our team’s next-best-action and next-best-engagement models are built to do, deciding which HCP, when, which channel, and what content, now live across 10+ markets. The lesson baked into the numbers is the one worth flagging upward: the models only pay off on clean, connected data.
09
⚙️ You can now tell Claude exactly how hard to think
Claude Opus 4.8 shipped with user-facing effort controls (dial reasoning up or down), dynamic workflows in Claude Code, and a cheaper, faster mode. Read more
10
📣 Merck bet a billion dollars on rebuilding how it talks to doctors
Merck laid out a major AI-driven commercial strategy to reimagine how it engages HCPs, a reported $1B effort leaning on generative AI. Read more
11
🔎 Google forced AI into Search. Users started fleeing to a duck.
After Google made AI Overviews and AI Mode central to Search at I/O 2026, DuckDuckGo reported U.S. app installs up about 30% at peak, plus a surge to its AI-free search page. Read more
12
🕵️ Thousands of vendors sell “AI agents.” Gartner says about 130 are real.
Gartner estimates only about 130 of the thousands of “agentic AI” vendors are genuinely agentic, and predicts 40%+ of agentic AI projects will be scrapped by end of 2027. The rest is “agent washing,” rebranded chatbots and RPA. Read more
13
🎯 Your move next: NOVA is live
◆ LILLY · AI UPSKILLING
While Claude was busy winning enterprise, Lilly's own NOVA AI Upskilling Program went live earlier this month. It pairs personalized AI learning paths with Workera, a skill-assessment platform that maps your current capabilities against where you want to be, all SSO-enabled, zero friction to start.
→ NOVA Hub → FAQs
That's a wrap, see you next month. ✦
But before you go, we left something fun at the bottom. No peeking ahead.
